figures.caption: FIG. 5. Amplitude and nuclear decay rate for fixed modulation index β. By increasing the amplitude and frequency of the modulation proportionally, we can characterize the suppression of the response and the decay due to high applied magnetic fields. Experimentally measured data points are fitted with Eqs. (B1) and (8), respectively, assuming Γe = Γm. The fits are used as input when fitting Eq. (11).
